steps.title: Set equations equal to solve for x
steps.content:
Since both equations equal $y$, set them equal:
$$-15x + 21 = -21x + 27$$
Add $21x$ to both sides: $6x + 21 = 27$
Subtract 21: $6x = 6$
Divide by 6: $x = 1$

steps.title: Substitute to find y
steps.content:
Plug $x = 1$ into the first equation:
$$y = -15(1) + 21 = 6$$
The solution is $(1, 6)$. That confirms C is correct.
